headline: DOCUMENTATION THAT PROVES COMPLIANCE
subheading: Master GMP document hierarchy, lifecycle and ALCOA+ data integrity to stay inspection-ready every day.
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury abstract editorial composition evoking pharmaceutical GMP document control and data integrity. A pristine cascade of crisp white document layers fanning into a clear five-tier hierarchy, each layer linked by fine luminous teal connection lines suggesting traceability and version control. Brushed-steel laboratory bench surface below, a faint embossed grid and tabbed dividers catching soft directional light, with abstract glowing audit-trail nodes and a subtle cyan checkmark seal motif rendered as pure shape. Deep navy background with teal and cyan light, a single fresh-green accent glow on one approved layer, shallow depth of field, sterile glassware bokeh dissolving in the distance, conveying order, control and trust. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
